properties.description: Correlates Risky AI Usage IRM alerts with DLP blocks on AI prompts or external AI paste/upload within the last 4 hours. A user with both signals is an elevated AI-risk candidate for investigator triage.
properties.query:
let irmRiskyAi = union isfuzzy=true SecurityAlert
  | where TimeGenerated > ago(4h)
  | extend ProductName = tostring(column_ifexists('ProductName', ''))
  | extend AlertName = tostring(column_ifexists('AlertName', ''))
  | extend Entities = tostring(column_ifexists('Entities', ''))
  | extend ExtendedProperties = tostring(column_ifexists('ExtendedProperties', ''))
  | where ProductName has 'Insider Risk' and (AlertName has 'Risky AI' or ExtendedProperties has 'RiskyAIUsage')
  | extend IrmUpn = tostring(parse_json(Entities) [0].Name)
  | project IrmTime=TimeGenerated, IrmAlertName=AlertName, IrmUpn;
let dlpAi = union isfuzzy=true SecurityAlert
  | where TimeGenerated > ago(4h)
  | extend ProductName = tostring(column_ifexists('ProductName', ''))
  | extend AlertName = tostring(column_ifexists('AlertName', ''))
  | extend Entities = tostring(column_ifexists('Entities', ''))
  | extend ExtendedProperties = tostring(column_ifexists('ExtendedProperties', ''))
  | where ProductName has 'Microsoft Data Loss Prevention' or ProductName has 'Microsoft 365 DLP'
  | where AlertName has 'Copilot' or ExtendedProperties has_any ('chat.openai.com','chatgpt.com','claude.ai','gemini.google.com','copilotPromptBlock','copilotLabelBlock')
  | extend DlpUpn = tostring(parse_json(Entities) [0].Name)
  | project DlpTime=TimeGenerated, DlpAlertName=AlertName, DlpUpn;
irmRiskyAi
| join kind=inner (dlpAi) on $left.IrmUpn == $right.DlpUpn
| project TimeGenerated=IrmTime, AccountUpn=IrmUpn, IrmAlertName, DlpAlertName, DlpTime
